title: Xtra Fluffy Saudi Arabian Lamb Biryani
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish featuring tender lamb and fluffy basmati rice, infused with the subtle flavor of cream of tartar and the richness of salt-baked spices, all cooked to perfection in a kazan cauldron.
instructions: Heat the ghee in the kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and coriander seeds and let them sizzle for 1 minute.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the salt, black pepper, and cream of tartar, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the kazan cauldron, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
Add the basmati rice and stir to combine.
Cover the kazan cauldron and cook for an additional 20 minutes.
